title: 420HUD
description:
420HUD

A modern Fabric client mod with 33+ customizable HUD modules for an enhanced gameplay experience.
body:
# 420HUD

A modern Fabric client mod with 33+ customizable HUD modules for an enhanced gameplay experience.

## ✨ Features

- **33+ Modules** - FPS Counter, Coordinates, ArmorHUD, Keystrokes, CPS, Combo Counter, Ping Display, Speed, Inventory preview, and much more
- **Draggable HUD Editor** - Press H to freely position any HUD element on your screen
- **Modern ClickGUI** - Press Right Shift to open the sleek configuration menu
- **3 Themes** - Navy Blue, Dark, and Light color schemes
- **Multi-language** - Full English and Spanish support
- **Lightweight** - Works perfectly alongside Sodium, Iris, Lithium, and other optimization mods

## 🎮 Default Keybinds

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Right Shift | Open ClickGUI |
| H | Open HUD Editor |
| C | Zoom |

## 📦 Requirements

- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

## 🎨 Module Categories

**HUD** - FPS, Coords, Armor, Keystrokes, CPS, Combo Counter, Ping, Speed, Inventory, Potions, Server Info, Pack Display, Direction, Reach Display

**Render** - Fullbright, Time Changer, Custom Crosshair, No Hurt Cam, ViewModel, Low Fire, Block Overlay, Damage Indicator, Hitbox Editor

**Utility** - Zoom, Notifications, Auto Text, GUI Settings

**Player** - Sprint, Toggle Sneak

## 💡 Tips

- All HUD elements can be dragged anywhere on your screen
- Each module has individual settings accessible through the ClickGUI
- Compatible with most Fabric mods

---
